title: Communauté de communes du Val de Somme
summary: The Communauté de communes du Val de Somme  is a communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Hauts-de-France région of France. Its seat is Corbie. Its area is 246.4 km2, and its population was 26,646 in 2018.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Val de Somme  is a communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Hauts-de-France région of France. Its seat is Corbie. Its area is 246.4 km2, and its population was 26,646 in 2018.

Composition
The communauté de communes consists of the following 33 communes:
